name: Dr. Neha Agarwal
bio: Dr. Neha Agarwal directs the Inclusive Design Lab where she investigates how AI-powered interfaces can be made accessible to users with visual and motor impairments. Her group built a screen-reader-optimized conversational agent for rural healthcare workers that reduced task completion time by 40 percent in field trials across Maharashtra. She created a design framework for explainable AI interfaces validated through longitudinal studies with clinicians. Her current NSF-funded project studies how non-technical users build mental models of language model behavior through interactive experimentation.
